items.name_cn:
Genuine Grade
 Diorstar❤Hobo Chain Bag "Black"
This Diorstar Hobo chain bag is a new arrival from the 2024 Spring/Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, featuring a stylish and practical design. It has a soft silhouette, crafted from black textured calfskin with an oversized houndstooth pattern and a spacious compartment. It features a zip closure with a circular charm engraved with the Christian Dior Paris logo and the classic Dior star motif, and exquisite CD rivets on the sides for added style. The interior is lined with suede leather and includes card slots. It comes with an adjustable CD chain shoulder strap with a leather strap for enhanced comfort when carrying.
Zip closure with a circular charm engraved with the Christian Dior Paris logo and star
1 compartment
1 slip pocket
4 card slots
Leather and gold-finish metal chain adjustable shoulder strap
Model: 3202
Dimensions: 28.5×14.5×10cm (L×H×W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 2 card holders, and sunglasses

items.name_cn:
Genuine Grade
Diorstar❤Hobo Chain Bag "Blue Fabric"
This Diorstar Hobo chain bag is a new arrival from the 2024 Spring/Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, featuring a stylish and practical design. Crafted from jacquard fabric with a blue Oblique print, it has a soft silhouette with a spacious compartment. It features a zip closure with a circular charm engraved with the Christian Dior Paris logo and the classic Dior star motif, and exquisite CD rivets on the sides for added style. The interior is lined with suede leather and includes card slots. It comes with an adjustable CD chain shoulder strap with a leather strap for enhanced comfort when carrying.
Zip closure with a circular charm engraved with the Christian Dior Paris logo and star
1 compartment
1 slip pocket
4 card slots
Leather and gold-finish metal chain adjustable shoulder strap
Model: 3202
Dimensions: 28.5 x 14.5 x 10 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 2 card holders, and sunglasses
